name: data-platform
description: Data-platform team — 4 agents (database-setup-guide, etl-pipeline-engineer, dashboard-builder, connector-developer) for cloud-database setup, ELT pipelines (Airbyte / Fivetran / n8n) with connectors for QuickBooks / Stripe / Salesforce / HubSpot / GA4 / Shopify / HRIS plus Planhat / Intercom / Slack-as-a-data-source deep-dives plus 7 new support-tool integration deep-dives (Freshdesk, SFDC Service Cloud, JSM, HubSpot Service, Help Scout, Front, the 2026 Fivetran connector-MAR build-vs-buy math), and embedded dashboards (Evidence.dev / Superset / Metabase / Cube + Tremor). 13 skills (incl. support-ticket-normalization — conformed fct_ticket + fct_conversation_event over 8 support vendors, and cross-system-identity-resolution — the account spine stitching a Salesforce account to a Planhat / Intercom / Slack identity), 12 templates, a 24-doc knowledge bank (+ Sigma-when-already-owned), and 21 best-practices. Opinionated against per-viewer-priced BI (Looker / Tableau / Sigma) for greenfield SMB selection — but leverages Sigma when the client already owns it. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.
